hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm[[:space:]]+-rf|rm[[:space:]]+-fr|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+--force|git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard|DROP[[:space:]]+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 2; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */worker/*.ts) ws=worker;; */app/*.ts|*/app/*.tsx) ws=app;; *) exit 0;; esac; out=$(npm --prefix "$ws" run typecheck 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; echo "typecheck failed ($ws) — 위 타입 에러를 수정하세요." >&2; exit 2; }
